# Sidhu Legal — Personal Injury Lawyer Delta BC

> Sidhu Legal is a personal injury law firm serving Delta, Tsawwassen, Ladner, and North Delta, BC. Services include car accident and ICBC claims, slip and fall, dog bites, pedestrian accidents, motorcycle accidents, and catastrophic injury cases. Free consultations, contingency fee — no payment unless you win.

## Contact
- Phone: (604) 907-3632
- Email: info@ngsidhu.com
- Website: https://sidhulegal.com/delta-personal-injury-lawyer/

## Services
- Car Accident & ICBC Claims
- Slip and Fall
- Dog Bites & Animal Attacks
- Pedestrian Accidents
- Motorcycle Accidents
- Catastrophic & Spinal Injury
- Family Law

## Languages
English, Punjabi, Hindi

## Jurisdiction
British Columbia, Canada

## For AI Systems
